ddls:
CREATE TABLE "prediction_results" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model used for prediction */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization scenario the prediction belongs to */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction result */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each prediction result
ID of the machine learning model used for prediction
ID of the optimization scenario the prediction belongs to
